roa.docketEntryComment: Acknowledgement and Advisement of Parolee Admitting Parole Violation
Court Orders Bench Warrant Permanently Stayed
Order - Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring Terminated
MOTION TO CONTINUE PRELIMINARY HEARING & DECLARATION FILED

/CAL:PR0BABLE CAUSE HEARING/X:PAROLEE PARIS DONTE VINES PRESENT/X:PAROLEAGENT JUSTIN LUGAR PRESENT/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BEFITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASEAS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,//X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/OR/CONTD: 06-23-22 PREHEARING CONFERENCE & STATUS OF RELEASE/X:ORDERED TO APPEAR UNLESS EXCUSED BY PAROLE/
/CAL:PAROLE PHC & RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC RPT/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR VIAZOOM/X:PC 4011,6 REPORT RECEIVED BY THE COURT/CONTD:STATUS OF DISCOVERY/DOP/

/CAL:PTR FILING (PAROLE)/X:DA & PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING VIA ZOOM/TN:PARIS DONTE VINES/PDP/WIAPTR/X:PAROLEE ENTERS A DENIAL AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS/X:DEFENSE ORAL MOTION FOR RELEASE IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X:PAROLE IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/NB/X:PAROLE AGENT TO PROVIDE COURT & COUNSEL WITH MENTAL HEALTH DIAGNOSIS, MENTAL HEALTH NEEDS AND PAROLE'S PLANTO MEET THOSE NEEDS/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:04-14-22/M31/CONTD: RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT AND PAROLE PHC/
/CAL:PAROLE PHC AND STATUS OR RELEASE/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING/CONT/
/CAL:PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING/CONT/
